name: Performance Golf & Sports
about: Performance Golf & Sports is a family-owned indoor golf and event space in Watertown, SD, offering a high-tech environment for play, practice, and corporate events. The facility utilizes high-definition aboutGolf simulators with GSPro integration, providing access to local courses like Minnehaha Country Club and internationally renowned venues such as Pebble Beach and St. Andrews. Pricing is structured at $35 per hour, plus tax, with memberships available by request. The venue is known for its community-focused approach and BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) and BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, offering a flexible and welcoming experience for golfers of all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-renowned courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews without leaving Watertown
High-precision aG® simulators with GSPro integration and comprehensive data tracking for swing analysis
A relaxed, family-owned community environment that is not weather-dependent

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is permitted (BYOF - Bring Your Own Food). Delivery from local area restaurants is also welcome.
Outside beverages are permitted (BYOB - Bring Your Own Beverage).

simulator_hardware.notes: High-definition simulator with machine vision technology

walk_ins_allowed: Walk-in members cannot be guaranteed simulator time; therefore, a reservation is always recommended.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The rental of a simulator does not come with a golf lesson or instruction. You must bring your own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, we are a BYOF & BYOB facility (Bring Your Own Food & Beverage). Outside food and beverage is permitted so you can bring your own or have it delivered.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The standard rental is for a 2-hour time slot. A 15-minute buffer is built-in to allow everyone to get in and out of the bays, which is typically sufficient for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-owned and has a relaxed environment. The dress code allows for casual attire, making it a welcoming space for families.
